site.title: Themadhood's Goods
site.tagline: Physical and digital goods created under the Themadhood ecosystem.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood's Goods handles physical and digital goods, including jewelry, creations, and trinkets.

footer.title: Themadhood's Goods
footer.line2: Themadhood's Goods operates as a parent entity for affiliated projects.

hero.headline: Themadhood's Goods
body: Themadhood's Goods exists to create and deliver physical and digital items under the Themadhood ecosystem.
This includes branch-specific releases, custom goods, and project-tied items designed to stay consistent with Themadhood identity.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's Goods is the goods division within the broader Themadhood ecosystem.
When a goods subtree does not maintain its own public presence, product direction and updates may route through this branch.

items.title: Themadhood's Julery
items.body: Jewelry and wearable items created under Themadhood goods, including themed pieces and limited releases.

items.title: Themadhood's Stained Glass
items.body: Stained glass pieces created under Themadhood Goods, including decorative panels, themed designs, and limited handcrafted works.

items.title: Themadhood's Creations
items.body: Handmade and crafted items, including mixed-media builds and unique project creations.

items.title: Themadgood's Trinkets
items.body: Small goods, accessories, and collectible trinkets released under Themadhood goods.

items.title: Other/ Routed Through Us
items.body: Requests that don’t clearly fall under a specific goods subtree, including custom or experimental goods.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
